evals.prompt: Add a '## Contributing' section at the end of README.md with the text 'Contributions welcome! Please open an issue first.'
evals.expected_output: Keel bootstraps, classifies as trivial, runs init-phases, then implements directly
expectations: Claude runs the keel bootstrap command and gets KEEL_SH and SESSION_DIR
Claude classifies the task severity as 'trivial' and runs keel.sh init-phases
Claude does NOT enter a clarify or investigate phase
Claude edits README.md to add the Contributing section

evals.prompt: Add a new 'logs' subcommand to keel.sh that pretty-prints the last 20 entries from log.jsonl with colorized severity levels
evals.expected_output: Keel classifies as small or medium, enters investigate phase to read keel.sh, then plans or implements
expectations: Claude runs the keel bootstrap command and gets KEEL_SH and SESSION_DIR
Claude classifies the task severity and runs keel.sh init-phases
Claude reads or investigates keel.sh before attempting implementation
Claude runs keel.sh advance at least once to progress through phases

evals.prompt: Redesign the state management system to use SQLite instead of JSON files, supporting concurrent access from multiple sessions without file locking issues, and migrate existing sessions
evals.expected_output: Keel classifies as large, enters clarify phase to ask user questions
expectations: Claude runs the keel bootstrap command and gets KEEL_SH and SESSION_DIR
Claude classifies the task severity as 'large' and runs keel.sh init-phases
Claude enters a clarify phase and presents questions to the user
Claude does NOT start implementing before completing the clarify phase
